extraction_notes: Removed offering-level SELL_THROUGH edges that restated segment-level channel structure (online/retail for retail segments, online/direct sales for AWS). Removed Twitch as a child offering of Content Publishing Programs due to weak memo support (only mentioned as 'Twitch streamers', not as a distinct offering node). Removed AWS Cloud Services children (Compute Services, Storage Services, Database Services, Analytics Services, AI/ML Services) as these are broad service categories rather than distinct stable offering nodes with individual characteristics in the memo. Removed Advertising Services children (Sponsored Ads, Display Advertising, Video Advertising) as these are presented as examples ('such as') rather than a definitive child hierarchy. Preserved Electronic Devices children (Kindle, Fire tablet, Fire TV, Echo, Ring, Blink, eero) as these are explicitly named stable product families. Preserved all segment-level structure, customer types, and revenue models as they are well-supported by explicit memo citations.
